title: gymnanthemum pectiniforme
intro: Gymnanthemum pectiniforme, also known as African blue basil or narrow leaf hyptis, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and relieving respiratory issues. Gymnanthemum pectiniforme is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
